Yellow Web Tools

Draggable bookmarklets for Facebook ads.

yellowweb.top · Telegram

build 190526b1

Campaign export, import, clone, media, identities, pixels, and catalogs for Ads Manager.

build 200526b1

build 200526b1

Hub build 200526b8. Click a yellow bookmarklet to copy it, or drag it to the bookmarks bar.
